default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss internet connectivity options for GrowthX AI's new San Francisco office.](https://fathom.video/share/gnGhFr5VHsWBx7j3qHEB_SxgGcy-jmhG?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX AI seeks 1Gbps dedicated fiber internet for their new SF office (move-in \~Apr 1)](https://fathom.video/share/gnGhFr5VHsWBx7j3qHEB_SxgGcy-jmhG?tab=summary&timestamp=29.0)
  - [Lightyear will source quotes for 1yr & 3yr terms, excluding AT\&T (already quoted \~$900-1000/mo)](https://fathom.video/share/gnGhFr5VHsWBx7j3qHEB_SxgGcy-jmhG?tab=summary&timestamp=196.0)
  - [Comcast fiber confirmed on-net (65ft from building); existing coax & Google Fiber/Webpass present](https://fathom.video/share/gnGhFr5VHsWBx7j3qHEB_SxgGcy-jmhG?tab=summary&timestamp=964.0)
  - [Lightyear provides free procurement, monetizing through carrier commissions](https://fathom.video/share/gnGhFr5VHsWBx7j3qHEB_SxgGcy-jmhG?tab=summary&timestamp=674.0)

## Topics

### GrowthX AI Background & Requirements

  - [New org (\~3mo old), just completed Series A](https://fathom.video/share/gnGhFr5VHsWBx7j3qHEB_SxgGcy-jmhG?tab=summary&timestamp=33.0)
  - [Seeking SF office space, aiming for Apr 1 move-in (not finalized)](https://fathom.video/share/gnGhFr5VHsWBx7j3qHEB_SxgGcy-jmhG?tab=summary&timestamp=76.0)
  - [Need: 1Gbps dedicated fiber w/ committed access rate (CAR)](https://fathom.video/share/gnGhFr5VHsWBx7j3qHEB_SxgGcy-jmhG?tab=summary&timestamp=113.0)
  - [Want: Block of static IPs (though not hosting services)](https://fathom.video/share/gnGhFr5VHsWBx7j3qHEB_SxgGcy-jmhG?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [AT\&T already quoted for backup circuit (\~$130/mo shared)](https://fathom.video/share/gnGhFr5VHsWBx7j3qHEB_SxgGcy-jmhG?tab=summary&timestamp=291.0)

### Carrier Landscape & Options

  - [AT\&T excluded as primary (already chosen for backup)](https://fathom.video/share/gnGhFr5VHsWBx7j3qHEB_SxgGcy-jmhG?tab=summary&timestamp=440.0)
  - [Comcast confirmed as viable option (65ft fiber presence)](https://fathom.video/share/gnGhFr5VHsWBx7j3qHEB_SxgGcy-jmhG?tab=summary&timestamp=964.0)
  - [Google Fiber/Webpass equipment spotted in building photos](https://fathom.video/share/gnGhFr5VHsWBx7j3qHEB_SxgGcy-jmhG?tab=summary&timestamp=902.0)
  - [Yousef unfamiliar w/ SF providers (coming from East Coast experience)](https://fathom.video/share/gnGhFr5VHsWBx7j3qHEB_SxgGcy-jmhG?tab=summary&timestamp=385.0)
  - [Earth Link mentioned but dismissed as outdated](https://fathom.video/share/gnGhFr5VHsWBx7j3qHEB_SxgGcy-jmhG?tab=summary&timestamp=402.0)

### Installation Timeline & Considerations

  - [Ideal: As close to Apr 1 as possible](https://fathom.video/share/gnGhFr5VHsWBx7j3qHEB_SxgGcy-jmhG?tab=summary&timestamp=522.0)
  - [Reality: 4-5 days (lit building) to 90-120 days (construction needed)](https://fathom.video/share/gnGhFr5VHsWBx7j3qHEB_SxgGcy-jmhG?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
  - [AT\&T backup can be installed quickly (1-2 days) as stopgap](https://fathom.video/share/gnGhFr5VHsWBx7j3qHEB_SxgGcy-jmhG?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)

### Lightyear's Process & Value Prop

  - [Source multiple quotes within 24-72hrs](https://fathom.video/share/gnGhFr5VHsWBx7j3qHEB_SxgGcy-jmhG?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
  - [Vet against internal dataset for competitiveness](https://fathom.video/share/gnGhFr5VHsWBx7j3qHEB_SxgGcy-jmhG?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
  - [Free service, monetizing through carrier commissions](https://fathom.video/share/gnGhFr5VHsWBx7j3qHEB_SxgGcy-jmhG?tab=summary&timestamp=674.0)
  - [Provide actionable timelines with quotes](https://fathom.video/share/gnGhFr5VHsWBx7j3qHEB_SxgGcy-jmhG?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)

### Contract Terms & Flexibility

  - [Request for both 1-year and 3-year pricing options](https://fathom.video/share/gnGhFr5VHsWBx7j3qHEB_SxgGcy-jmhG?tab=summary&timestamp=746.0)
  - [Awareness of potential hefty termination fees](https://fathom.video/share/gnGhFr5VHsWBx7j3qHEB_SxgGcy-jmhG?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
  - [New org may prefer shorter commitments](https://fathom.video/share/gnGhFr5VHsWBx7j3qHEB_SxgGcy-jmhG?tab=summary&timestamp=731.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Lightyear to initiate quote process (excluding AT\&T)](https://fathom.video/share/gnGhFr5VHsWBx7j3qHEB_SxgGcy-jmhG?tab=summary&timestamp=794.0)
  - [Quotes to include 1-year and 3-year term options](https://fathom.video/share/gnGhFr5VHsWBx7j3qHEB_SxgGcy-jmhG?tab=summary&timestamp=746.0)
  - [Yousef to receive email notification when quotes arrive](https://fathom.video/share/gnGhFr5VHsWBx7j3qHEB_SxgGcy-jmhG?tab=summary&timestamp=703.0)
  - [Yousef to review quotes in Lightyear platform](https://fathom.video/share/gnGhFr5VHsWBx7j3qHEB_SxgGcy-jmhG?tab=summary&timestamp=703.0)
  - [Follow-up communications as needed for questions/clarifications](https://fathom.video/share/gnGhFr5VHsWBx7j3qHEB_SxgGcy-jmhG?tab=summary&timestamp=804.0)

action_items.description: Submit request for quotes (DIA fiber, ~1Gbps, not AT&T/last mile) for 201 Spear St SF
Edit quote form - add 1yr/3yr options, put AT&T on denial list
